title: Long-shot recording of Zo doing some complex task
body: Record a longer-form video demonstrating Zo executing a complex, multi-step workflow that showcases its capabilities end-to-end

title: Three independent vignettes showing core capabilities
body: Create three short, standalone demonstrations of key Zo capabilities. Each should be independently reproducible on a clean Zo instance without dependencies on prior setup

title: Build vignettes on demonstrator account for signup incentive
body: Pre-build all three vignettes on a demonstrator account. Offer them as free templates/setups for new signups who meet criteria X

title: Most impressive capability demonstration
body: Focus demo on the single most impressive thing Zo can do. Don't dilute the message—lead with the wow factor

title: Clean up and organize this Zo for demo
body: Clean up V's current Zo instance to have a pristine, well-organized system that can serve as the demo environment. Show off a polished, production-ready workspace
